response.global_summary: The video contains three distinct musical performances. The first segment features a virtual performer singing 'Ai no Scenario' by HoneyWorks. The second segment features three virtual performers singing 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!', and the third segment features the same three performers singing 'Legend-Changer'. The latter two songs are associated with Cygames.

scenes.description: A virtual performer in a white outfit sings 'Ai no Scenario' on a stage with a red-carpeted staircase.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
世界欺く揺るぎない正義
ほどいて真実この手の中

大胆不敵な影が華麗に踊る
君が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせてよ
伸ばした手で触れる事は誰もできない
君が隠してる世界僕に見させてよ

揺れる難解な心
解き明かして奪うその瞳
不安がって泣いてたって見つけらんないよ
狙う真実はどこへ消え、た

たとえ
世界欺く解答だとしても
信じて差し出す掌
決して逃げない怖くは無いから
目を開け弱さをかき消すんだ

繰り返される運命に君は気づいてる？
僕が隠してる秘密いつか聞かせるよ
歩み寄る偽りの影君は知らない
芽生えた記憶は絡む必然の棘で

守りたい想いでただ
立ち向かって解くその絆
何度だって助けるって揺るぎはしないよ
隠す真実はどこへ消え、た

たとえ
世界を敵に回したとしても
「信じて」僕だけ未来も
決して逃げない迷いは無いから
シナリオ壊して抗うんだ

世界を敵に回したとしても
「信じて」差し出す掌
決して離さ無い想いは届いた
結んだ運命この手の中

繰り返された解答だとしても
決して逃げない怖くは無いから
抗うんだ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
one day i'll tear apart these lies
and bring justice to the world
the power to unwind the truth -
i know it's within my hands
there's a shadow dancing gracefully,
coming in and out of sight
keeping such a heavy secret by yourself,
please let me hear you out someday
as it is there really is no helping it,
you're just so slightly out of reach
all alone inside a world you've hid away
i hope you'll let me in someday
unable to find again that pair of eyes
just with a single look, all it took, bringing peace of mind
caught in hurries, drowned in worries,
tears had made it all blurry
i've lost sight of the truth that i've been chasing all this time
even if it were an answer bearing lies,
if i must deceive the world
i'd give my hand and say to you, "oh won't you trust me?"
i'll never run away 'cause there's
nothing to be scared of now
open my eyes, look far and wide - i'm ready to face my fears!
surely even you've caught on by now?
this never ending fate of ours
there's a secret that i haven't told you yet
i promise that i'll share some day
an ominous shadow is gaining up on you,
though you're not aware of it
tangled in the thorns of memories that will
inevitably bloom some day
all i know is that i want to keep you safe
no matter what it takes, i will shake free of this binding cage
i'll keep my vow to always protect you
though my purpose has stayed true
i've lost sight of the truth that i've been hiding to this day
even if it seems that
all the world decides to become your enemy
please just believe, only in me -- and our future
i'll never run away 'cause there's not a single doubt right now
i'll shatter this scenario! i won't stop 'til it's over
even if all of the world decides to become my enemy
i'd give my hand and say to you, "oh won't you trust me?"
i'll never let you go 'cause i found the answer that i need
the power to realize the truth - it's finally within my hands
even if it's an answer that will repeat itself again…
i'll never run away 'cause there's nothing to be scared of now
i won't stop 'til it's over!

scenes.description: Three virtual performers dancing and singing 'U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!'.
Three virtual performers dancing and singing 'Legend-Changer'.

response.thoughts:
**Concert Analysis & Lyric Retrieval Plan**

Okay, here's the game plan for this concert video analysis. First, I need to break down the video into segments and identify the songs. I've got a good handle on that, and it's looking pretty straightforward.

*   **Segment Breakdown:** I've identified three distinct segments: the pink-haired performer doing "アイのシナリオ (Ai no Scenario)," then a transition with the crowd, followed by segments featuring three virtual performers singing "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!" and "Legend-Changer." The on-screen text confirms these titles and composers/lyricists (伊藤亮 from Cygames for the latter two). I've noted the timestamps for each.

Next, it's time to confirm and resolve the song metadata. "Ai no Scenario" sounds very familiar and a quick check confirms HoneyWorks as the likely original artist. I'll search to verify the exact artist if needed. I already know that songs 2 and 3 are composed and written by 伊藤亮, as the credits on screen show. I should perform a quick search to ensure it aligns.

*   **Song Metadata:**
    *   **Song 1:** "アイのシナリオ (Ai no Scenario)" by HoneyWorks.
    *   **Song 2:** "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!" by 伊藤亮 (Cygames).
    *   **Song 3:** "Legend-Changer" by 伊藤亮 (Cygames).

Now, the core task: retrieving the lyrics. I'll use a parallel batching approach, aiming for efficiency. My first attempt will involve simultaneous searches in both Japanese and English. I'll use the queries "アイのシナリオ HoneyWorks 歌詞," "Ai no Scenario HoneyWorks lyrics English," "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!! 伊藤亮 Cygames 歌詞," "U.M.A. NEW WORLD!! 伊藤亮 Cygames lyrics English," "Legend-Changer 伊藤亮 Cygames 歌詞," and "Legend-Changer 伊藤亮 Cygames lyrics English."

*   **Search Strategy (Turn 1):** I'll use `web_search_langsearch_multi` with the following queries:
    1.  `アイのシナリオ HoneyWorks 歌詞`
    2.  `Ai no Scenario HoneyWorks lyrics English`
    3.  `U.M.A. NEW WORLD!! 伊藤亮 Cygames 歌詞`
    4.  `U.M.A. NEW WORLD!! 伊藤亮 Cygames lyrics English`
    5.  `Legend-Changer 伊藤亮 Cygames 歌詞`
    6.  `Legend-Changer 伊藤亮 Cygames lyrics English`

I'll wait for the search tool output. If any of these searches fail or turn up incomplete results, I'll have a fallback strategy and execute additional searches in Turn 2, which I have planned, but I will make the first pass with the queries shown. My initial focus will be on getting the complete official Japanese lyrics. The English lyrics are a nice-to-have but not critical if the Japanese are available. And of course, now I remember I have to output the result via the final\_result structure. I'll be sure to do that!



**My Analysis of the Search Results**

Okay, let's break this down systematically. I've been given some song titles and need to verify the metadata and grab lyrics where available, all from the search results I have access to.

First up, **"Ai no Scenario"** by HoneyWorks (or CHiCO with HoneyWorks). The search looks good; I've got both the Japanese and English lyrics, so no issues there.

Next, **"U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!"**. Right, the search confirms the title and artist information, but there's a slight discrepancy. The user's prompt listed "伊藤亮 (Cygames)" for 作曲 and the search results show "伊礼完 (Cygames)". A quick double-check... Yes, both the prompt and the search result do mention Cygames. I'm going to lean towards using "伊礼完" as the composer, as I'm thinking about consistency. Ah, but wait, the instructions are clear: *all* information must come from the search results. Okay, then, for consistency, I'll use the on-screen attribution or the search result. Either way, the lyrics themselves aren't included in the search results – it says "歌词加载中" or just lists the song information. The search tool didn't provide any lyrics, so I'll need to set that to null.

Finally, **"Legend-Changer"**. The search results are, again, unhelpful in that I've got no lyrics. The search did not provide them. Setting those to null as well.

Important: I have to remember that the lyrics *must* come solely from the search results, as per the instructions.

So, the plan looks like this:

*   Scene 1: 00:00 - 01:14 (Ai no Scenario) - Lyrics found, no problem.
*   Scene 2: 01:19 - 03:59 (U.M.A. NEW WORLD!!) - Lyrics unavailable, set to null.
*   Scene 3: 04:02 - 04:57 (Legend-Changer) - Lyrics unavailable, set to null.

I'm ready to populate the `final_result` structure with this confirmed information.
